purpose: Global Sanctum shell frame for stable operator layout lanes.
truth_rules: Frame styling must not imply system PASS by itself.
Operator state chips must come from explicit truth surfaces.
proof_requirements: Shell zones map to static layout files.
fake_green_risks: Decorative frame can look healthy while backend is disconnected.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
